Case Law Cited
Pramati Educational and Cultural Trust v. Union of India [2014] 11 
SCR 712 : (2014) 8 SCC 1 – doubted.
Lala Shri Bhagwan v. Shri Ram Chand [1965] 3 SCR 218; In 
Re: Kerala Education Bill, 1957 [1959] 1 SCR 995; T.M.A. Pai 
Foundation v. State of Karnataka [2002] Supp. 3 SCR 587 : (2002) 
8 SCC 481; Ahmedabad St. Xavier’s College Society v. State of 
Gujarat [1975] 1 SCR 173 : (1974) 1 SCC 717 – followed.
M. Ramachandran v. Govind Ballabh [1999] Supp. 3 SCR 38 : 
(1999) 8 SCC 592; K. Narayanan v. State of Karnataka [1994] 
Supp. 2 SCR 105 : (1994) Supp. 1 SCC 44 : 1994 SCC (L&S) 
392 – relied on.
Society for Unaided Private Schools of Rajasthan v. Union of India 
[2012] 2 SCR 715 : (2012) 6 SCC 102; Society for Unaided Private 
Schools of Rajasthan v. Union of India [2012] 2 SCR 715 : (2012) 
6 SCC 1; P. A. Inamdar v. State of Maharashtra [2005] Supp. 2 
418 
Supreme Court Reports
SCR 603 : (2005) 6 SCC 537; Ashoka Kumar Thakur v. Union of
